description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust depicting a bearded male figure with curly hair, draped in a toga-like garment. The sculpture is finely detailed, with realistic facial features, textured hair, and a carefully rendered beard. The bust is mounted on a round pedestal base, which provides stability and elevates the figure. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, focusing on the drapery and the support structure. The surface appears slightly weathered, with subtle variations in color and texture typical of aged marble. The overall impression is one of dignified realism, reminiscent of Greco-Roman portraiture.
description: A detailed marble bust of a bearded man in classical attire, mounted on a round pedestal. The sculpture features realistic facial details and textured hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, curly hair, and draped garment of the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, beard, and the curvature of the drapery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the supporting pedestal, with less detail on facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the draped garment from a different angle.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
